issues.description: Effect is missing the condition 'You may place 3 cards from your trash at the bottom of your deck' which should gate the entire effect. This is an optional action that triggers the rest of the sequence.
Missing action to place 3 cards from trash to bottom of deck (SearchDeck or similar with trash source)
Missing final action 'you may place up to 1 card from your opponent's trash at the bottom of their deck' (conditional placement action)
ForceDiscard targets opponent's hand correctly, but the action sequence should only trigger IF the player chooses to place 3 cards from trash first
